testcase.name: testPopulationBoostOnlyOnceFix

failure.message: Population should not increase on second boost call (boosted=30) ==> expected: <30> but was: <45>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Population should not increase on second boost call (boosted=30) ==> expected: <30> but was: <45> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:563) at migration.F2PMigrationTests.testPopulationBoostOnlyOnceFix(F2PMigrationTests.java:35) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: testFollowersKeepUpAtHighSpeed

failure.message: Followers fell too far behind at high speed. Avg dist low=101.58 high=432.86 ratio=4.26 (must be < 2.0) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Followers fell too far behind at high speed. Avg dist low=101.58 high=432.86 ratio=4.26 (must be < 2.0) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.failNotTrue(AssertTrue.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.assertTrue(AssertTrue.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue(Assertions.java:214) at migration.F2PMigrationTests.testFollowersKeepUpAtHighSpeed(F2PMigrationTests.java:99) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: testLeaderReassignmentFromNearbyBoids

failure.message: Nearby boid should receive leadership in all runs (won 1/5) ==> expected: <5> but was: <1>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Nearby boid should receive leadership in all runs (won 1/5) ==> expected: <5> but was: <1> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:563) at migration.F2PMigrationTests.testLeaderReassignmentFromNearbyBoids(F2PMigrationTests.java:81) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
